# Project Skill

Use when:
- working on the Leave Management project as a whole
- answering questions about project architecture, folders, and routing
- debugging database, session, or template issues
- understanding how controllers, services, middleware, and views connect
- adding new features or modifying existing workflows

## What this skill covers
- overall app structure
- route-to-controller mapping
- middleware behavior and user access control
- key folders and file responsibilities
- standard patterns used in this project

### Files to review
- `index.php`
- `routes/web.php`
- `app/Core/Router.php`
- `app/Controllers/*.php`
- `app/Services/*.php`
- `app/Core/*.php`
- `app/Views/**/*.php`
- `config/*.php`
- `public/*`
- `authentication-system-guide.md`
- `PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md`
